curation_notes: Patch modifies 3 non-test source files: internal/application/service/mcp_service.go (adds ValidateStdioConfig calls in CreateMCPService and UpdateMCPService), internal/mcp/client.go (adds validation before subprocess execution in NewMCPClient), and internal/utils/security.go (new ValidateStdioConfig function with command allowlisting). Locations derived from the patch diff — the vulnerable code paths are where user-controlled stdio_config.command/args flow into subprocess execution without validation. Vulnerability class confirmed as command-injection from CWE-77 and advisory description.
